---
title: "NeurIPS 2026 Workshop: AI for Chip Design"
---

# AI for Chip Design

**NeurIPS 2026 Workshop**

<!-- Add banner image here later -->

## Overview

This workshop brings together researchers and practitioners working at the intersection of artificial intelligence and semiconductor design.

The workshop will explore advances in machine learning methods for chip design, including emerging AI-driven approaches for design automation, optimization, verification, and hardware-aware learning.

The goal is to foster discussion between the machine learning, electronic design automation, and hardware communities, and to identify new opportunities for AI-enabled chip development.

## Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|---|---|
| Call for Papers | Coming soon |
| Submission Deadline | TBD |
| Notification | September 29, 2026 |
| Workshop | December 2026, NeurIPS 2026, Paris, France |

## Submission

Submissions will be handled through OpenReview.

The submission link and detailed instructions will be announced soon.

## Topics of Interest

Topics include, but are not limited to:

- AI for electronic design automation
- Machine learning for chip optimization
- AI-assisted hardware design
- Neural architectures for hardware efficiency
- Hardware-aware machine learning
- Large language models for chip design
- AI agents for design automation
- Verification and validation using AI
- Open-source tools and datasets for AI-driven chip design

## Organizers

See the [Organizers](organizers.qmd) page for details.

## Contact

For questions, please contact: dario.garcia@bsc.es
